news.t: Now Trading: Direxion's New Bull & Bear ETFs for Shopify & Lockheed Martin

holdings.infoBox: SHPU is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 35.85%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 24.37%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 20.29%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 16.09%, and Shopify at 14.78%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily SHOP Bull 2X ETF (SHPU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price performance of the common shares of Shopify Inc. (SHOP) SHPU was launched on Aug 6, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Now Trading: Direxion's New Bull & Bear ETFs for Shopify & Lockheed Martin
data.text: NEW YORK, NY / ACCESS Newswire / August 6, 2025 / Direxion, a leading provider of ETFs for tactical traders, and a pioneer in Single Stock Daily Leveraged & Inverse ETFs, today launched four new funds...
